chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA No.152 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge Present: Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui, and Ms. Sana Akram Minhas, JJ. _ 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.892/2024 (Stay) 26.4.2024 Mr. Umair Bachani, Advocate for Appellant Mr. Touqeer Ahmed Seehar, Advocate for NHA a/w Mr. Hafeezullah, Advocate. Mr. Malik Altaf holding brief for Mr. Faizan Hussain Memon, Advocate for Respondent No.4 Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, DAG. ************* Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui, J: The urgency is pleaded by the Appellant’s counsel as the impugned order issued was suspended, hence the Appellant was aggrieved. This Appeal impugned an order of 01.4.2024 and this is only an ad interim order. Learned Counsel for Appellant has taken us to the brief facts of the case that how he was deprived to enjoy the office where he was recently transferred, by virtue of the ad interim order. However, we realized that this is only an ad interim order. The application is yet to be decided finally along with the maintainability issue of the suit, as raised. We, therefore, deem it appropriate that in order to provide an opportunity to all litigants they should first exhaust their remedy before the first forum having jurisdiction and it would be appreciated if the learned Single Judge would hear and decide not only the pending application but also the legal objections raised, leading to the maintainability of the suit, within two weeks’ time desirably. With this understanding the Appeal is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Shakeel, PS.
